name: get_elements_on_level
description: Get all elements placed on a specified Revit level.

level_name.description: The name of the level to search for (case-insensitive).

categories.description: Optional list of category names to include (case-insensitive). Example: ['Walls', 'Floors', 'Doors']

message.description: Contains error message or status text if success is false.

element_count.description: Number of elements found on the specified level.

elements.description: List of element data objects found on the level.
